name: Twinkie Cake Recipe
recipeInstructions:
Mix all ingredients together and bake cake according to package time and temperature. Allow cake to cool, then split in half.
For Filling:
1. Mix milk and flour together in saucepan. Bring mixture to a boil until thickened.
2. Cool the mixture.
3. Beat the cooled mixture with a mixer until fluffy.
4. Add remaining ingredients (sugar, salt, Crisco, butter, and vanilla) one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Spread filling between cake layers.
For Frosting:
1. Prepare frosting by opening a can of Dark Fudge frosting.
2. If desired, add a pinch of baking powder to the frosting for extra lift.
3. Frost the entire cake with the frosting.
4. Allow the cake to stand at least 6 hours before serving to allow the flavors to develop.
